title: Repository Structure — Constitution
description: Declared project constitution. Mirrors the user-facing `constitution` block in slopbrick.config.mjs. Written by slopbrick to .slopbrick/constitution.json. Read by slopbrick, the constitution-enforcement gate, stackpick (for pattern-suggestion enforcement), and any future tool that needs to know what the project has declared off-limits.

version.description: Schema version. Bump when adding/removing fields. Currently "5".

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this constitution was generated.

workspace.description: Absolute path of the workspace this constitution applies to.

declared.description: Declared canonical pattern per category. Empty or omitted means 'we deliberately don't use this category.' The category keys match the `category` enum in inventory.schema.json.

forbidden.description: Bare package specifiers that any PR introducing must fail (deny-list). Matched against import strings during constitution enforcement.

forbiddenPrefixes.description: Scope prefixes that any PR introducing must fail (e.g. '@scope/'). Matched as prefix against import strings.

items.description: Must end with '/' to indicate it's a prefix.
